text.title: Ambiguity and Contradiction Detector Examples
text.summary: Worked example: input → output trace, end-to-end.

example.step: Trigger: BA → eng handoff of `/docs/req/v3.2/checkout.md` (12 pages).
Run detector across 5 categories. Findings: 7 total (1 blocking, 3 major, 3 minor).
Blocking finding: AC-12 (p95 ≤5s) contradicts AC-19 (p95 ≤2s). Quote captured verbatim with section ref.
Remediation: BA owner reconciles AC-12 / AC-19 with sponsor; updates doc; re-runs detector — 0 blocking findings remain.
Report committed; consumers gated until run_id-N+1 closed all blockers.
